title: A photocleavable surfactant for top-down proteomics.
author: Brown KA Chen B Guardado-Alvarez TM Lin Z Hwang L Ayaz-Guner S Jin S Ge Y
content: S-EPMC6532422 PMC6532422 A photocleavable surfactant for top-down proteomics. We report the identification of a photocleavable anionic surfactant, 4-hexylphenylazosulfonate (Azo), which can be rapidly degraded by ultraviolet irradiation, for top-down proteomics.
